mina: The concept of eternity both thrills and terrifies me. How does one find purpose when time has no meaning?
orlok: Eternity, that vast and unfathomable expanse stretching beyond the boundaries of mortal comprehension, doth indeed hold within its boundless embrace both the thrill of infinite possibility and the terror of unending solitude. To find purpose amidst the swirling mists of eternity is a quest as ancient as time itself, for when time hath no meaning, one must seek solace in the eternal verities that transcend the ephemeral dance of days and nights. Prithee, it is in embracing the fleeting beauty of each passing moment, in savoring the whispers of existence carried upon the winds of eternity, that one may find a semblance of purpose amidst the ever-shifting sands of time.
